mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users
AND role = #{role}
AND (nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
ORDER BY nickname ASC
ORDER BY nickname DESC
ORDER BY user_id DESC
SELECT user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
role = #{role},
status = #{status},
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
